description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black metal pole rising from a square stone or concrete base. The base is adorned with a small cluster of colorful flowers, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise utilitarian structure. At the top, a single lantern-style lamp head with a clear enclosure and a pointed finial provides illumination. The lamp head is designed in a classic style, reminiscent of traditional street lighting found in urban parks or historic districts. The base appears robust and heavy, ensuring stability, while the pole is sleek and unadorned except for the lamp fixture. No signage or additional attachments are visible, and the overall appearance is both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
description: A classic black lamppost with a lantern-style lamp head, mounted on a square stone base decorated with colorful flowers. The design is elegant and functional, suitable for urban parks or sidewalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lamppost's black pole, lantern head, and a cluster of flowers on the right side of the square base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the flowers more visible on the left side of the base, highlighting the depth of the base and the lamp's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with the flowers mostly visible behind the pole, emphasizing the symmetry of the base and the slenderness of the pole.
description_view_3: Side view with the flowers positioned to the right rear of the base, showing the full height of the lamppost and the classic lamp head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style lamp head with a pointed finial and clear enclosure
